hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"This project keeps its memory in the agent-memory MCP server (Portable Agent Memory). Before doing anything else, call recall with folder agent-qa to pick up where the last session left off, on any machine. When a decision is made, call remember right then with folder agent-qa. Before the session ends, recall first, then remember one handoff digest that supersedes earlier status notes."}}'
